name: Villca's Funny Food/Villca's Bakery (LEGACY EDITION)
description:
Villca's Funny Food/VIllca's Bakery: LEGACY is a tribute to the original THOSE NIGHTS AT VILLCA'S trilogy!

[ Please go visit the original author of VB: https://gamejolt.com/@VillcaToons ]

~(STORY)~

You are a bottom of the barrel, barely-scraping-by citizen of an low end city, as you pass by looking for jobs you see that Villca's Funny Food is hiring and after an lengthy interview you score the job and now you prepare for the first night on the job.
creator: L4rr
